# Pantera Claw

> AI and data consulting firm based in Salt Lake City, Utah. We help small and mid-size businesses turn raw data into actionable insights, custom dashboards, and AI-powered workflows.

Site: https://www.agenticaiutah.com
Contact: info@panteraclaw.com · +1 (801) 898-0911
Hours: Mon–Fri, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Mountain Time

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://www.agenticaiutah.com/): Overview of Pantera Claw — AI and data consulting for growing businesses.
- [Services](https://www.agenticaiutah.com/services): Five disciplines — business web development, database architecture, dashboard engineering, agentic AI, and advanced analytics.
- [AI Consulting in Salt Lake City](https://www.agenticaiutah.com/ai-consulting-salt-lake-city): Local landing page — agentic AI, RAG pipelines, and ML systems for Utah businesses across Salt Lake, Provo, Ogden, and the Wasatch Front.
- [About](https://www.agenticaiutah.com/about): Company story, the Pantera Claw standard (agility, precision, reliability, innovation), and mission.
- [Contact](https://www.agenticaiutah.com/contact): Free consultation meeting request form. Salt Lake City, UT — serves clients nationwide.

## Services in Detail

- Business Analytics Consulting — Custom analytics solutions that help businesses make data-driven decisions.
- Custom Dashboard Development — Interactive dashboards built to visualize your key performance indicators.
- AI Workflow Automation — Agentic AI systems that automate repetitive business processes.
- Database Management — Scalable database architecture and data pipeline engineering.
- Data Strategy Consulting — Strategic roadmaps for becoming a data-driven organization.
- Business Intelligence Solutions — End-to-end BI platforms for reporting and operational insights.
- Machine Learning Consulting — Custom ML models for prediction, segmentation, and classification.

## Blog

- [Local SEO in the AI Era: Getting Found When Customers Ask ChatGPT for Recommendations](https://www.agenticaiutah.com/blog/local-seo-in-the-ai-era-getting-found-when-customers-ask-chatgpt-for-recommendations): How to make your business visible when customers skip Google and ask ChatGPT, Perplexity, and AI Overviews.
- [Using AI to Write Your Marketing Copy Without Sounding Like a Robot](https://www.agenticaiutah.com/blog/using-ai-to-write-your-marketing-copy-without-sounding-like-a-robot): How to use AI writing tools so your brand voice stays front and center.
- [What a Realistic AI Budget Looks Like for a Ten Person Company](https://www.agenticaiutah.com/blog/what-a-realistic-ai-budget-looks-like-for-a-ten-person-company): What a small team should actually expect to spend on AI and where that money goes.
- [AI Agents vs. Spreadsheets: Choosing the Right Tool for Your Business](https://www.agenticaiutah.com/blog/ai-agents-vs-spreadsheets-choosing-the-right-tool-for-your-business): When AI agents win, when spreadsheets win, and how to decide.
